---
title: "Learning outcomes"
subtitle: "Program, department, and course-level outcomes mapped against each other"
date: last-modified
---

::: {.callout-warning}
## Scaffold placeholder
Outcomes are stored as YAML files under `outcomes/data/` (one file per
level) and rendered into this page. The mapping work has not started.
This page is the eventual home of the outcomes cross-reference matrix.
:::

# The three levels

| Level | Authority | Granularity |
|---|---|---|
| Program | Faculty of Science / EESC | "A Freshwater Science graduate will..." |
| Department | EESC / Biology | Subject-area outcomes |
| Course | Individual instructor | Per-course / per-module outcomes |

# Why this matters

Mapping outcomes against each other reveals two things students rarely see
clearly:

1. **Vertical coherence** — does each program-level outcome map to a
   department-level outcome map to one or more course-level outcomes?
   Gaps point to missing course content.
2. **Lateral coverage** — does the program graduate students with
   *transferable* skills, or do skills stay siloed within their
   teaching course?

# Pending content

- [ ] Define schema for `program_outcomes.yml`, `department_outcomes.yml`,
      and `course_outcomes.yml`.
- [ ] Seed program-level outcomes from the Faculty of Science statement.
- [ ] Interview each Freshwater Science instructor for course-level
      outcomes (estimated 20-40 hours of structured interviews).
- [ ] Render the outcomes-by-course matrix here.
